title: rinorea aylmeri
intro: Rinorea aylmeri, also known as the Aylmer's violet or Aylmer's kidney root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Violaceae. Traditionally, Rinorea aylmeri is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and urinary tract infections, due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, such as pain and discomfort, and its potential to prevent kidney damage. Rinorea aylmeri can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support kidney health and prevent urinary tract infections.
